VitalRounds
Website: https://vitalrounds.com.au
Primary offering: Clinical observership program pathways in Australia for doctors and international medical graduates (IMGs).

Key pages
- Home: https://vitalrounds.com.au/
- Join wait list: https://vitalrounds.com.au/waitlist
- Login: https://vitalrounds.com.au/login

Summary
VitalRounds supports doctors seeking clinical observership opportunities in Australia. The platform coordinates applicant submissions, document review, and hospital-facing workflows to help bridge local clinical exposure gaps.

Contact
- admin@vitalrounds.com.au
